app.name: Pascoal
app.subtitle: Pascal Playground
editor.enunciado_placeholder: Select an example from the sidebar.
terminal.hint2: Select an example and click Run.
terminal.no_electron: Run inside Electron to compile Pascal.
terminal.no_electron2: In the browser, only the interface is available.
modal.welcome.subtitle: Pascal Playground
modal.welcome.p1: Welcome to Pascoal, an interactive playground to write, compile and run Pascal programs directly on your machine.
modal.welcome.p2: Explore the examples in the sidebar, edit freely in the editor and click Run to see the result.
modal.welcome.note: Make sure you have Free Pascal (FPC) installed. See instructions in README.md.
fpc.dialog.not_found.title: Free Pascal not found
fpc.dialog.not_found.message: The Free Pascal compiler (FPC) was not found on your machine.
fpc.dialog.not_found.detail: FPC is required to compile and run Pascal programs. Would you like to open the download page?
fpc.dialog.install.title: Installation instructions
fpc.dialog.install.detail:
1. Complete the installation normally
2. Restart Pascoal
3. Try running again
fpc.error.not_found: FPC not found. Install Free Pascal and try again.
